title: APT Cheat Sheet
description: Essential APT commands for package management on Debian-based systems.

commands.description: Update the package list to get information on the newest versions of packages and their dependencies.

commands.description: Search for a package in the package list.

commands.description: Remove a package and its configuration files.

commands.description: Clean up the local repository of retrieved package files.

commands.description: Remove packages that were automatically installed to satisfy dependencies for other packages and are no longer needed.

commands.description: Upgrade the system by installing/upgrading packages.
